windows.embed_text_v2: check temperature of melted wax with glass thermometer in stainless steel pouring pitcher on stovetop, clear yellow molten wax, candle making melting stage
windows.summary_v2: Checking the temperature of a pitcher of fully melted clear yellow wax on a stovetop with a glass thermometer.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down into a stainless steel pouring pitcher of fully melted clear yellow wax on a stovetop, a red-tipped glass thermometer dipped toward the wax to read temperature.
Same steel pitcher of clear molten yellow wax, glass thermometer hanging into the liquid near the centre.
Continued view of the melted wax in the steel jug, thermometer probe resting just above the wax pool.
Glass thermometer tip touches the surface of the clear yellow melted wax inside the steel pitcher on the burner.
Thermometer dipped deeper into the molten yellow wax, colored gauge stripe visible on the stem.
Same melting jug, thermometer measuring the temperature of the clear liquid wax.
Top-down of the steel pitcher of melted yellow wax, glass thermometer angled across the centre.
Continued temperature check of the molten wax with the red-bulb glass thermometer in the steel jug.
Final frame: fully melted clear yellow wax in the steel pouring pitcher with the thermometer measuring it on the stove.
